professional.name: Nzenwata Sinclair
professional.title: Full-Stack Developer & Creative Technologist
professional.summary: Passionate developer with expertise in web development, VR/3D experiences, and creative problem-solving. Specialized in React, Node.js, and immersive technologies with a focus on building engaging user experiences that bridge design and functionality.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and build scalable web and mobile applications for university faculty and departments.
highlights: Developed scalable web applications using React and TypeScript in a production environment
Collaborated with UX designers, PMs, and videographers to deliver user-centered products
Designed database architecture and implemented secure authentication systems using MySQL and Duo SSO
Built full-stack features with modern frameworks, improving performance and maintainability

experience.title: Co-Founder & Software Engineer
experience.description: Building a student-focused marketplace platform enabling secure buying, selling, and service exchange within university communities.
highlights: Developed mobile application using React Native (Expo) with backend microservices in AdonisJS
Designed and implemented REST APIs, Docker containerization, and CI/CD pipelines for app deployment
Integrated Firebase push notifications and AWS SES for real-time communication and email delivery
Implemented Duo 2FA authentication for secure admin and enterprise-level access control

experience.title: Undergraduate Data Science Researcher
experience.description: Worked on energy analytics and forecasting for campus sustainability initiatives.
highlights: Contributed to Ball State Energy Dashboard for analyzing and forecasting energy usage
Built data pipelines and visualization tools for real-world sustainability insights
Applied data science techniques to support campus-level decision making

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed and improved a school management system with focus on scalability and maintainability.
highlights: Built student management features and integrated RESTful APIs into production system
Migrated large React codebase from JavaScript to TypeScript, improving type safety and maintainability
Collaborated remotely in a fast-paced startup environment

experience.title: Software Engineer Fellow
experience.description: Built and deployed multiple AI-driven applications in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
highlights: Developed and deployed live AI projects using React, Next.js, Firebase, Clerk, and Vercel
Applied agile methodologies and CI/CD practices in rapid development cycles
Collaborated in high-performance teams to ship production-ready features
Dean's List
Senator at SGA
4.0 GPA

certifications.name: The Builders Scholarship
certifications.description: Competitive scholarship recognizing academic excellence and potential in technology

about.journey: From Lagos to Muncie and back, my journey in technology has been shaped by curiosity and a passion for creating experiences that matter. Each project represents a step in my growth as a developer.
about.philosophy: I believe in writing code that's not just functional, but beautiful—code that solves real problems and creates lasting value for users.
